item.title: Speaking at BarcelonaJS: Introduction to Lovefield
item.description:
Last Thursday (1st of October of 2015), I gave a talk at BarcelonaJS group about Lovefield, a cross-browser SQL-Like relation query engine; here I left the slides that I created for that purpose.


See these slides in a single page & don’t forget to press “p” to see the notes which I’ve written

You can see the source code of my demo on a public gist under my GitHub account.

Thanks to the organisers, @patrickheneise, eth0lo and @isabelcabezasm for all the efforts to run this Javascript amazing community in Barcelona.

If you were there, I hope that you enjoyed or at least got something good from my talk; please feel free to provide an honest feedback in the comments.
